QF.id: Retirement Planning Products: National Pension System (NPS)_97

question.text: Neha is 28 years old and has chosen Auto Choice LC-50. What is her current approximate allocation to corporate bonds (C)?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Under LC-50, until age 35, the allocation is E=50%, C=30%, G=20%. Since Neha is 28 (under 35), her corporate bond allocation is 30%. **The Trap:** After age 35, the allocation starts shifting. But at 28, the full starting allocation of LC-50 applies: E=50%, C=30%, G=20%. **Cross-Exam Context:** LC-50 pre-35: E=50%, C=30%, G=20%. This is the starting point before the glide path kicks in at age 35. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Help young clients understand their current allocation under Auto Choice. At 28, LC-50 provides a balanced 50/30/20 split.
